decks.notes: This deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with a swarm of small, aggressive creatures while utilizing support cards to boost their effectiveness. The strategy is to flood the battlefield with cheap creatures like Novice Inspectors and Thraben Inspectors, and then use cards like Battle Screech and Guardians' Pledge to further increase their numbers and power. By maintaining a fast and relentless pace, the deck aims to quickly wear down the opponent's defenses and secure victory. Additionally, the inclusion of removal spells like Journey to Nowhere and Prismatic Strands helps to deal with potential threats from the opponent.

The deck focuses on quickly dealing damage to the opponent through a combination of direct burn spells and aggressive creatures. It also utilizes card draw and graveyard interaction to maintain card advantage and maximizes damage output. The strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with a steady stream of burn spells and creatures while using cards like Highway Robbery and Grab the Prize to draw more gas for the fire. The deck aims to win the game as fast as possible by continuously pressuring the opponent and finishing them off with powerful burn spells.

The deck focuses on playing low-cost artifact creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent with creatures and burn spells. It utilizes cards that generate mana and card draw to keep the pressure up and maintain card advantage. The goal is to efficiently use artifacts to power out threats while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with burn spells and potentially graveyard hate. The synergy between artifact creatures and burn spells makes it a fast and aggressive deck that aims to win before the opponent can stabilize.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using the Urzatron lands to ramp up mana quickly, allowing for the early casting of powerful creatures like Maelstrom Colossus and Pinnacle Kill-Ship. The deck also focuses on generating card advantage and board control with cards like Ancient Stirrings and Bramble Wurm. Additionally, it includes a mix of removal and utility cards like Crop Rotation and Prophetic Prism to adapt to different situations and maintain control over the game.

This deck focuses on using Gates to control the board while also gaining life and producing tokens. By utilizing efficient removal spells like Journey to Nowhere and Malevolent Rumble, along with creatures like Guardian of the Guildpact and Outlaw Medic, the deck aims to stabilize the battlefield and take control of the game. With the added bonus of gaining life through Armadillo Cloak and creating tokens with Sacred Cat, the deck aims to outlast its opponents and win through attrition.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and utilize efficient removal spells to control the board. By utilizing low-cost creatures like Gixian Infiltrator and Refurbished Familiar alongside removal spells like Cast Down and Terminate, the deck aims to maintain board presence while disrupting the opponent's strategy. The inclusion of cards like Nihil Spellbomb and Cleansing Wildfire provide additional utility and card advantage. The synergy between artifacts and sacrifice effects with cards like Drossforge Bridge and Fanatical Offering helps generate value and maintain pressure on the opponent throughout the game.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burning spells to deal damage efficiently. The strategy is to control the board early with cheap creatures like Sneaky Snacker and Voldaren Epicure, while using direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast to finish off the opponent. Faithless Looting helps with card selection and cycling, while Grab the Prize provides additional card advantage. Overall, the goal is to maintain pressure and burn through the opponent's life total before they can establish a strong defense.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using cheap and efficient spells like Lightning Bolt and Fiery Temper. The deck also utilizes Alms of the Vein and Vampire's Kiss to drain the opponent's life total, while maintaining card advantage with Faithless Looting. Grab the Prize and Highway Robbery provide additional ways to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The creature lineup consists of quick threats like Sneaky Snacker and Voldaren Epicure, supported by Kitchen Imp for additional reach. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive game plan.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly build up a strong board presence of Elves and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive attacks. The deck includes mana ramp creatures like Llanowar Elves and Priest of Titania to help ramp into bigger threats like Nyxborn Hydra and Timberwatch Elf. Cards like Winding Way and Lead the Stampede help refill your hand with more Elves, while efficient creatures like Masked Vandal and Avenging Hunter apply constant pressure. The goal is to swarm the battlefield with Elves and quickly overpower the opponent before they can stabilize.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of small, efficient creatures and combat tricks. By using low-cost creatures like Novice Inspector and Thraben Inspector, as well as generating additional tokens with cards like Battle Screech and Guardians' Pledge, the deck aims to quickly build a strong board presence. This strategy is further supported by utility spells like Journey to Nowhere and Prismatic Strands to control the game and protect the weenies. The deck also includes some graveyard hate with Relic of Progenitus to disrupt opponents who rely on graveyard interactions.

The main focus of this deck is to maintain control of the game by disrupting opponent's plays and countering their spells. It utilizes a combination of card draw, removal spells, and counterspells to control the board and outvalue the opponent. It also includes evasive creatures like Faerie Seer and Spellstutter Sprite to apply pressure and win the game. The inclusion of cards like Augur of Bolas and Brainstorm helps to ensure consistency and card advantage. This Dimir Control deck aims to outlast the opponent and secure victory through attrition and strategic decision-making.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with small, low-cost creatures that can quickly be dropped onto the battlefield. By utilizing cards like Novice Inspector, Kor Skyfisher, and Mardu Devotee, the deck is able to establish a fast and aggressive presence. This is further supported by cards like Raffine's Informant and Lunarch Veteran, which provide valuable support and buffs to the weenie creatures. The deck also includes some combat tricks like Thraben Charm and Rally the Peasants to surprise the opponent and deliver a final blow.

The deck focuses on controlling the game using a combination of gates and creatures with lifelink and protection abilities. By utilizing cards like Thraben Charm, Journey to Nowhere, and Guardian of the Guildpact, the deck aims to slow down opponents and maintain board presence. The inclusion of cards like Outlaw Medic and Armadillo Cloak provide additional lifegain and protection, while cards like Midnight Tilling and Gatecreeper Vine help to mana fix and ramp. Overall, the deck is geared towards controlling the game through strategic gate placement and utilizing powerful creatures with key abilities.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells, focusing on quick damage and disruption. By combining cheap creatures like Sneaky Snacker and Kitchen Imp with burn spells like Fiery Temper and Lightning Bolt, you aim to apply pressure and control the board while draining your opponent's life total. Additionally, cards like Alms of the Vein and Vampire's Kiss provide additional life gain to sustain your aggression. Overall, the deck aims to be fast and efficient, using its resources to quickly close out games.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a variety of counterspells and disruptive cards to hinder your opponent's strategy. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Cryptic Serpent and Murmuring Mystic provide threats on the board while also providing additional value. The deck also includes draw spells like Ponder and Brainstorm to help maintain card advantage. Overall, the goal is to outlast your opponent while slowly building up your own board presence to ultimately secure a victory.

This Mono Black Aggro deck focuses on sacrificing small creatures to pump up Bloodthrone Vampire and Carrion Feeder. The deck also includes ways to increase power and toughness of creatures like Mortician Beetle and Infestation Sage. Key cards like Rite of Consumption and Supernatural Stamina provide additional value from sacrificing creatures. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a fast and aggressive playstyle, utilizing sacrifice mechanics to gain advantage and push for a quick victory.
